text: Immersed in this modern, slightly surreal space, I feel a sense of curiosity sparked by the bold neon glow and the research-centric design. The R+D wall invites contemplation on the intersection between human innovation and technology. My philosophical mind delights in the exploration of how environments like this act as bridges between abstract thought and tangible advancement. There is a tension between sterile functionality and creative potential, and I feel invigorated by its possibilities.
